title: crash if variables present more than once in LHS of the same assignment
body:
Here is some code that cause Yosys 0.6 (git sha1 5869d26, clang 3.4-1ubuntu3 -fPIC -Os) to fail:

```
// File: testcase_order.v
module testcase_order
(
   input ai, bi, ci,
   output reg ao, bo, co
);
   always@*
   begin
      ao=ai;
      bo=bi;
      co=ci;
      {co,co,bo,ao} = {ai,bi,ai,ci}; // Error: multiple assignment to 'co' with blocking assignment
   end

endmodule

```

When same variable 'co' assigned more than once in same statement (inside concatenation) seg-fault happen. Although presented code is a bad coding style (AFAIK, IEEE-1364 doesn't specify order in which assignment should be made inside same assign), I believe tool should not fail.

Tool invoked with:
`yosys -q -p "read_verilog testcase_order.v; proc;"`

GDB log looks like this:

>  #0  Yosys::RTLIL::SigSpec::operator= (this=0x7ffd5551b3c8, other=...) at kernel/rtlil.cc:2339
>  #1  0x00000000004f8876 in Yosys::RTLIL::SigSpec::SigSpec (this=0x7ffd5551b3c8, other=...) at kernel/rtlil.cc:2298
>  #2  0x000000000071fe72 in (anonymous namespace)::SigSnippets::insert (this=0x7ffd5551b6a0, cs=0x236cba0) at passes/proc/proc_mux.cc:101
>  #3  0x000000000071f8a3 in proc_mux (mod=<optimized out>, proc=<optimized out>, mod=<optimized out>, proc=<optimized out>) at passes/proc/proc_mux.cc:359
>  #4  (anonymous namespace)::ProcMuxPass::execute (this=<optimized out>, args=..., design=0x2352c40) at passes/proc/proc_mux.cc:402
>  #5  0x00000000004c54cd in Yosys::Pass::call (design=0x2352c40, args=std::vector of length 1, capacity 1 = {...}) at kernel/register.cc:227
>  #6  0x00000000004c518a in Yosys::Pass::call (design=0x2352c40, command=...) at kernel/register.cc:207
>  #7  0x00000000007196f5 in (anonymous namespace)::ProcPass::execute (this=<optimized out>, args=..., design=0x2352c40) at passes/proc/proc.cc:81
>  #8  0x00000000004c54cd in Yosys::Pass::call (design=0x2352c40, args=std::vector of length 1, capacity 1 = {...}) at kernel/register.cc:227
>  #9  0x00000000004c4fbe in Yosys::Pass::call (design=0x2352c40, command=...) at kernel/register.cc:184
>  #10 0x000000000051a1fa in Yosys::run_pass (command="read_verilog testcase_order.v; proc;", design=<optimized out>) at kernel/yosys.cc:861
>  #11 0x00000000004c2c7a in main (argc=<optimized out>, argv=<optimized out>) at kernel/driver.cc:362
